description: Create two saved SQL queries in the Chinook database to document the system schema using the HSQLDB INFORMATION_SCHEMA. The first query, named 'TableColumnCatalog', must list all user table columns in the 'PUBLIC' schema (excluding system tables) and include Table Name, Column Name, Type Name, Ordinal Position, and Nullability, sorted by Table Name then Ordinal Position. The second query, named 'PrimaryKeyCatalog', must list all primary keys in the 'PUBLIC' schema and include Table Name, Column Name, Key Sequence, and PK Name, sorted by Table Name then Key Sequence. Save the database file to ensure all changes are persisted.
